summary: Armenian (hy) language implementation testing complete. All 13 test features verified successfully. Armenian text renders correctly across all pages with proper font support.

issues: CTA buttons (Become a Partner, Request a Quote) show in English - missing ctaPartner/ctaQuote fields in Armenian content
Partner type cards (Travel Agencies, Hotels, etc.) now have Armenian translations after fix

action_items: Add missing Armenian translations for ctaPartner and ctaQuote fields in TravelAgencies.js (low priority - currently shows English fallback)
Consider adding Armenian (hy) translations to relatedPages array in TravelAgencies.js for consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Armenian language support successfully implemented. Key changes made: Partners.js hy content object was missing required fields (badge, ctaPartner, ctaQuote, services, whyPoints, howSteps, trustPoints, etc.) - these were added. The targets array in Partners.js now has Armenian translations for name and tagline fields.
